description: Composition Red check shirt with white and blue accents, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, embroidered branding above the patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton and cuts that offer a flattering Fit, this casual check shirt from Locomotiove offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Either button the sleeves at the cuffs or roll them up and secure them with the mid-sleeve flaps for a more casual style. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
